feature: MillenniumIT P3c — Quote Entry + Drop Copy
requirement: Market maker quotes, drop copy execution reports

tasks.title: Quote entry + drop copy types/stores/handlers/gateway
tasks.description:
Add market maker quotes and drop copy to securities-service.

APPEND to types.go:
- Quote struct: ID, InstrumentID, FirmID, BidPrice float64, BidQuantity int, AskPrice float64, AskQuantity int, Status (ACTIVE/WITHDRAWN/EXPIRED), BidOrderID string, AskOrderID string, TenantID, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt — json tags
- DropCopySubscription struct: ID, FirmID, TenantID, Active bool, CreatedAt — json tags
- ExecutionReport struct: ID, TradeID, OrderID, InstrumentID, Side, Price float64, Quantity int, FirmID, Timestamp — json tags

APPEND to store.go:
- QuoteStore interface: Create, Get, List(instrumentID, firmID optional), Withdraw(id), InMemoryQuoteStore
- DropCopyStore interface: Subscribe(sub), Unsubscribe(firmID), GetSubscription(firmID), ListReports(firmID) ([]ExecutionReport), LogReport(*ExecutionReport), InMemoryDropCopyStore

Create handlers_quote.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/quotes — submit quote (validate: instrument_id, firm_id, bid/ask prices > 0, quantities > 0). Create 2 orders (buy at bid, sell at ask) via orderStore, link IDs back to quote.
- GET /api/v1/securities/quotes — list active quotes (?instrument_id=, ?firm_id=)
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/quotes/{id} — withdraw quote (cancel linked orders)

Create handlers_drop_copy.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/drop-copy/subscribe — subscribe firm {firm_id}
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/drop-copy/subscribe/{firm_id} — unsubscribe
- GET /api/v1/securities/drop-copy/reports?firm_id=X — list execution reports for firm

Wire drop copy into matching engine: after each trade, if either party's firm has a drop copy subscription, log ExecutionReport.

Update server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for quotes + drop copy
tasks.description:
Write tests for quote entry and drop copy.

Tests:

1. store_test.go:
- TestQuoteStore_Create_List — create quote, list → 1
- TestQuoteStore_Withdraw — withdraw → status WITHDRAWN
- TestQuoteStore_FilterByInstrument
- TestDropCopyStore_Subscribe_Unsubscribe
- TestDropCopyStore_LogReport_ListReports

2. handlers_quote_test.go:
- TestSubmitQuote_Success — POST → 201, bid+ask orders created
- TestSubmitQuote_InvalidPrices → 400
- TestListQuotes — create 2, list → 2
- TestWithdrawQuote — DELETE → quote withdrawn, linked orders cancelled

3. handlers_drop_copy_test.go:
- TestSubscribe → 201
- TestListReports — subscribe, seed reports, list → filtered
- TestUnsubscribe → 200

4. engine_test.go:
- TestDropCopy_TradeGeneratesReport — trade between subscribed firm → report logged

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
